resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def minimumOneBitOperations(self, n: int) -> int:
        res = 0
        while n:
            n &= n - 1
            res += 1
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a bitwise operation to find the rightmost set bit in the binary representation of n. It then increments the result and continues until all bits are cleared. This approach is efficient because it only requires a single loop and a constant amount of space.
